LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT LAKEVIEW CONSTRUCTION, INC., TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT FOR UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICE, TRESPASS, WASTE, NUISANCE AND CLAIM AGAINST CONTRACTOR'S LICENSE BOARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF THE UNFAIR COMPETITION LAW. MERIGAN TO PLEAD MORE CLEARLY WHAT LAWS WERE VIOLATED, E.G., WHAT SECTION OF THE SAN FRANCISCO BUILDING CODE. MERIGAN ALSO TO PLEAD BASIS FOR RESTITUTION OR HOW IT HAS VESTED RIGHT TO THE MONEY PAID BY NAU. REMAINDER OF DEMURRER OVERRULED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Oct-22-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (212)

AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT LAKEVIEW CONSTRUCTION, INC., TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT for unfair business practice, trespass, waste, nuisance and claim against contractor's license board. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the first cause of action for violation of the unfair competition law. Merigan to plead more clearly what laws were violated, e.g., what section of the San Francisco Building Code. Merigan also to plead basis for restitution or how it has vested right to the money paid by Nau. Remainder of demurrer overruled. (302CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Amended Demurrer ; Mo To Strike; Memo Of P&A
